prediction.reasoning: Based on RTX (Raytheon Technologies) historical volatility patterns and typical defense sector stock behavior, I estimate modest upward movement over 18 days. RTX typically shows annual volatility around 25-30%, translating to roughly 4-6% potential movement over 18 trading days. The slight positive bias reflects defense sector stability and potential contract announcements. Confidence intervals widen symmetrically around the point estimate to account for market uncertainty, geopolitical factors, and earnings-related volatility typical for large defense contractors.
